tasks.title: Create ReadDefinition value object
tasks.acceptance:
- src/Routing/ReadDefinition.php has readonly props name/uri/output/middleware/statusCode/availableEvents
- fromConfig normalizes null, string URI-shorthand, options array
- defaults: output null, middleware [], statusCode 200, availableEvents null
tasks.closed_reason: src/Routing/ReadDefinition.php created; fromConfig normalizes 3 forms, defaults applied (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Validate read definition config
tasks.acceptance:
- fromConfig throws InvalidRouterConfigException on action/method/unrecognized key
- URI normalized via slash-trim of uri-or-key — empty, slash-only, placeholder URIs rejected
- multi-segment URIs allowed
tasks.closed_reason: action/method/unknown-key + invalid-uri rejection; trim-normalized URI; ReadDefinitionTest 11 pass (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Honor includeAvailableEvents in buildResponse
tasks.acceptance:
- buildResponse omits availableEvents key entirely when includeAvailableEvents false
- null and true both include availableEvents
- endpoints available_events now honored
tasks.closed_reason: buildResponse omits availableEvents when includeAvailableEvents===false; null/true include (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Throw RestoringStateException on idMap miss
tasks.acceptance:
- restoreCurrentStateDefinition throws RestoringStateException when machine_value absent from idMap
- foreign machineId no longer raises raw undefined-key error
tasks.closed_reason: restoreCurrentStateDefinition throws RestoringStateException on idMap miss (wrong-class 404) (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Add handleSnapshot read handler
tasks.acceptance:
- handleSnapshot restores via create(state:) with no send/persist/lock
- output split mirrors handleEndpoint (string/inner-tuple outputKey, plain array outputKeys, null fallback)
- RestoringStateException mapped to 404
tasks.closed_reason: handleSnapshot restores read-only (no send/persist/lock), output split mirrors handleEndpoint, 404 on RestoringStateException (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Materialize read routes in register
tasks.acceptance:
- reads normalized (true to status null) — reads-only proceeds past both content guards — package:discover short-circuits
- GET machineId-bound route with handleSnapshot, name prefix.read.name, read route defaults set
- group plus per-read middleware applied
tasks.closed_reason: register() parses reads (true/assoc), relaxes both content guards, GET machineId route + name + defaults (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Validate read route collisions
tasks.acceptance:
- duplicate normalized read URIs throw InvalidRouterConfigException
- read colliding with same-method same-path group route throws (exact method+path equality)
- model/modelFor/machineIdFor orphan validation unaffected by reads
tasks.closed_reason: duplicate-uri + GET machineId collision throw; model/modelFor unaffected (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Upsert only dirty rows in persist
tasks.acceptance:
- persist upserts only history dirty slice from max(0,watermark-1) to end
- index 0 stays full (never diffed) — previous tail downgraded full to diff
- last-row full-snapshot invariant preserved
tasks.closed_reason: persist upserts dirty slice array_slice(rows,max(0,watermark-1)); index0 full; last row full (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Track persisted watermark
tasks.acceptance:
- watermark captured at restore as loaded-row count — 0 for fresh machine
- watermark advanced to history count after successful persist
- full in-memory baseline walk retained
tasks.closed_reason: State::persistedEventCount captured at restore, advanced after persist; full baseline walk retained (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Persist inside transition transaction
tasks.acceptance:
- for isTransactional events persist runs inside the same DB transaction as transition
- non-transactional events unchanged (unwrapped)
- syncCurrentStates write covered by rollback boundary
tasks.closed_reason: transactional events run persist inside transition DB::transaction; non-transactional unchanged; PersistAtomicityTest passes (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Assign sequence_number from max plus one
tasks.acceptance:
- new event sequence_number is max in-memory history sequence_number plus one
- derived from loaded state history with no separate SELECT
- contiguous histories unaffected
tasks.closed_reason: setCurrentEventBehavior uses max(history)+1; SequenceNumberTest passes (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Unit-test ReadDefinition fromConfig
tasks.acceptance:
- tests cover null/string/array value forms and defaults
- action/method/unknown-key/invalid-uri rejection asserted
tasks.closed_reason: tests/Routing/ReadDefinitionTest.php — 11 tests pass (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Test reads route registration
tasks.acceptance:
- reads-true and associative forms register GET routes with correct names plus machineId binding
- reads-only registration registers routes
- colliding GET read versus endpoint throws
tasks.closed_reason: ReadSnapshotTest registration cases (true/assoc/reads-only/collision/duplicate) pass (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Feature-test reads endpoint
tasks.acceptance:
- read returns envelope state/availableEvents/output with isProcessing false
- zero-write on active machine (no machine_events rows, no lock row)
- archived machine read returns 200 via transparent restore
tasks.closed_reason: ReadSnapshotTest envelope + zero-write + archived pass (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Test read response shaping
tasks.acceptance:
- output routing: context-key list via outputKeys — OutputBehavior/tuple via outputKey — null fallback
- available_events false omits availableEvents key
- unknown machineId and wrong-class machineId return 404
tasks.closed_reason: ReadSnapshotTest output routing (array/OutputBehavior), available_events omit, 404 cases pass (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Test incremental persist
tasks.acceptance:
- only dirty rows written after restore plus event (rows before previous tail untouched)
- history over 5462 rows persists new event without QueryException — restored context matches
tasks.closed_reason: IncrementalPersistTest dirty-slice + round-trip pass (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Test persist atomicity
tasks.acceptance:
- forced persist failure for transactional event rolls back action DB write
- no orphan machine_events — machine not wedged (next send succeeds)
tasks.closed_reason: PersistAtomicityTest forced-failure rollback passes (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Test sequence numbering
tasks.acceptance:
- pruned-history append yields no duplicate sequence_number
- new number is max plus one
tasks.closed_reason: SequenceNumberTest prune-safe max+1 passes (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Write reads docs page
tasks.acceptance:
- docs/laravel-integration/reads.md covers concept, API, examples, optional migration
- cross-linked with endpoints.md command versus query
tasks.closed_reason: docs/laravel-integration/reads.md created; endpoints.md cross-link; vitepress nav (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

tasks.title: Document write-path hardening
tasks.acceptance: - persistence.md notes incremental persist, atomicity, max-based sequencing and rationale
tasks.closed_reason: persistence.md Write-Path Hardening note + transactional persist clarification (full gate green: phpstan 0, 2656 tests pass, type coverage 100%)

- section 8 nav row for reads.md — section 2 anti-pattern read-as-targetless-event

- references/output-keyword.md notes read output as fourth place
